task.title: Alert Management Backend Service
task.description: Build the core alert management service with webhook ingestion, notification routing, escalation policies, and on-call scheduling

implementation.details: 1. Set up Go service with gRPC endpoints 2. Implement webhook endpoints for alert ingestion 3. Create PostgreSQL schema for alerts, policies, schedules 4. Build notification routing engine based on severity/tags 5. Implement escalation policy engine with timeouts 6. Create on-call schedule management 7. Add alert acknowledgment and resolution tracking 8. Integrate Redis for real-time state management

task.acceptance_criteria: Verify webhook endpoints accept and process alerts correctly. Confirm notification routing works based on configured rules. Test escalation policies trigger after specified timeouts. Validate on-call schedules determine correct recipients. Ensure alert state transitions work properly.
